chapter_title.en: The Prayer for Seeking Rain (salat Al-istisqa)

text: 1495 - وَقَالَ أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلسَّحَابُ غِرْبَالُ اَلْمَطَرِ لَوْ لاَ ذَلِكَ لَأَفْسَدَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ وَقَعَ عَلَيْهِ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1495 - The Commander of the Faithful Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) said:
"The clouds are the sieve of the rain; without that, it would ruin everything it falls upon”.
